gut.example: Good bacteria live in your gut.
It takes guts to speak in front of a crowd.
gut.example_zh: 在眾人面前說話需要膽量。

habitat.example_zh: 汙染破壞了動物的棲息地。

haul.example: They hauled the boxes up the stairs.
The fishermen had a big haul today.
haul.example_zh: 漁夫今天的漁獲量很大。

hazard.example: Wet floors are a slipping hazard.
hazard.example_zh: 濕滑的地板有滑倒的危險。

heir.example: The prince is the heir to the throne.

hence.example: He was late; hence, he missed the bus.
hence.example_zh: 他遲到了，因此錯過了公車。

herb.example: She grows herbs in her garden.
herb.example_zh: 她在花園裡種香草植物。

heritage.example: The old castle is part of our heritage.
heritage.example_zh: 這座古堡是我們文化遺產的一部分。

highlight.example: Let me highlight the main points.
The trip to the zoo was the highlight of the day.
highlight.example_zh: 去動物園是今天最精彩的部分。

hockey.example: They play ice hockey in winter.
hockey.example_zh: 他們冬天打冰上曲棍球。

honorable.example: Helping the weak is an honorable act.
honorable.example_zh: 幫助弱者是件光榮的事。

horizontal.example: Draw a horizontal line across the page.

hormone.example_zh: 荷爾蒙影響我們的成長。

hostage.example: The robbers held two people hostage.

hostile.example: The dog seemed hostile to strangers.
hostile.example_zh: 那隻狗對陌生人顯得不友善。

hostility.example: There was hostility between the two groups.
hostility.example_zh: 兩派人馬之間存在敵意。

housing.example: The city needs more affordable housing.
housing.example_zh: 這座城市需要更多平價住宅。

howl.example: The wolf let out a long howl.
howl.example_zh: 狼發出一聲長長的嗥叫。

hypothesis.example_zh: 這個實驗驗證了她的假設。

icon.example: Tap the icon to open the app.
icon.example_zh: 點圖示就能打開應用程式。

ideology.example: The two parties have different ideologies.
ideology.example_zh: 這兩個政黨有不同的意識形態。

idiot.example: I felt like an idiot for forgetting her name.
idiot.example_zh: 忘了她的名字讓我覺得自己像個笨蛋。

illusion.example: The mirror created an illusion of space.
illusion.example_zh: 鏡子製造出空間變大的錯覺。

immense.example: The project took an immense amount of work.
immense.example_zh: 這個專案花了極大的工夫。

immune.example: A healthy diet keeps your immune system strong.
immune.example_zh: 健康飲食能維持免疫系統強健。

implement.example: The school will implement the new rule.
implement.example_zh: 學校將實施這項新規定。

implication.example: Consider the implications of your choice.
implication.example_zh: 想想你的選擇會帶來的後果。

impulse.example: She bought the dress on impulse.
impulse.example_zh: 她一時衝動買了那件洋裝。

incentive.example: A prize is a good incentive to study.
incentive.example_zh: 獎品是個讓人念書的好誘因。

incorporate.example: We incorporated her ideas into the plan.
incorporate.example_zh: 我們把她的想法納入了計畫。

index.example: Use the index to find the topic.
The price index rose this month.
index.example_zh: 這個月物價指數上升了。

indifferent.example: He was indifferent to the result.

indigenous.example: We learned about indigenous people of the island.
indigenous.example_zh: 我們認識了這座島的原住民。

indispensable.zh: 不可或缺的、必不可少的

indulge.example: She indulged in a slice of cake.
indulge.example_zh: 她放縱自己吃了一塊蛋糕。

inevitable.example_zh: 改變在人生中是不可避免的。

infect.example: The virus can infect many people.
infect.example_zh: 這種病毒會傳染給許多人。

infinite.example_zh: 太空看起來幾乎是無限的。

infrastructure.example: Roads and bridges are part of infrastructure.
infrastructure.example_zh: 道路和橋梁是基礎設施的一部分。

inherent.example_zh: 好奇心是孩子與生俱來的。

inherit.example: She inherited her mother's blue eyes.
inherit.example_zh: 她遺傳了母親的藍眼睛。

initiate.example: They initiated a project to help the poor.
initiate.example_zh: 他們發起了一項幫助窮人的計畫。

initiative.example: She showed initiative by starting early.
initiative.example_zh: 她提早開始，展現了主動性。

initiative.example: The city launched a green initiative.
initiative.example_zh: 市府推出了一項環保倡議。

injection.example: He got an injection at the clinic.

inning.example: Our team scored in the last inning.
inning.example_zh: 我們隊在最後一局得分。

innovation.example: The phone is full of clever innovation.
innovation.example_zh: 這支手機充滿了巧妙的創新。

innovative.example: She found an innovative way to recycle.
innovative.example_zh: 她想出一種創新的回收方法。

inquiry.example: They made an inquiry about the cost.

insane.example: Driving so fast is simply insane.

insight.example: The book gave me insight into history.
insight.example_zh: 這本書讓我對歷史有了深刻的理解。

installation.example: The installation of the software took time.
installation.example_zh: 軟體的安裝花了一些時間。

institute.example: She works at a research institute.
institute.example_zh: 她在一家研究機構工作。

institute.example: The school instituted a new policy.
institute.example_zh: 學校制定了一項新政策。

institution.example: The school is a respected institution.
institution.example_zh: 這所學校是個受人尊敬的機構。

integrate.example: They integrated the new students into the class.
integrate.example_zh: 他們讓新生融入了班級。

integration.example: The integration of the two teams went well.
integration.example_zh: 兩個團隊的整合很順利。

integrity.example: People trust her for her integrity.
integrity.example_zh: 人們因她的正直而信任她。
